Metadata.title: Savii - AI-Powered Expense Tracker | Free App
Metadata.description: Track your expenses with your voice, share lists in real time, and visualize your finances. Available in Spanish, English, and Portuguese. Download free.
Metadata.keywords: expense tracker,finance app,personal budget,shared expenses,voice recording,savii app
Metadata.ogDescription: Track your expenses with your voice, share lists in real time, and visualize your finances.

Hero.title: Take control of your expenses
Hero.subtitle: The app that listens to your voice, organizes your finances, and shows you where your money goes. Available in Spanish, English, and Portuguese.

Features.title: Features you'll love
Features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your personal finances in one app.

VoiceAI.title: Speak, Savii listens
VoiceAI.subtitle: Forget about typing. Just say what you spent and our AI does the rest.
VoiceAI.voiceExample: I spent fifty dollars at the supermarket
VoiceAI.stepSpeakDesc: Press the microphone and speak naturally

Screenshots.title: See Savii from the inside
Screenshots.subtitle: Explore the interface designed to make your financial life simpler.

SharedLists.title: Team finances
SharedLists.subtitle: Keep track of expenses with your partner, roommates, or family. Everyone records their expenses and all see the same balance in real time.

MultiLang.title: Your language, your currency
MultiLang.subtitle: Savii adapts to you, no matter where you are.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Savii.
FAQ.a0: Savii offers a free 7-day trial with access to all features. After that, you can continue with our subscription plan to keep enjoying the full experience.
FAQ.a1: Just press the microphone button and speak naturally. Our AI (Gemini) extracts the amount, detects the category, and generates a description automatically.
FAQ.q2: Can I share my expenses with my partner?
FAQ.a2: Yes! Create a shared list and invite your partner or roommate. Everyone records their expenses and everything syncs in real time.
FAQ.a3: Absolutely. Your data is stored securely on your device, and you can also back it up to the cloud.
FAQ.q4: What languages is it available in?
FAQ.a4: Savii is fully translated into Spanish, English, and Portuguese. Both the interface and voice recognition.
FAQ.q5: Can I use my own currency?
FAQ.a5: Yes, we support over 70 international currencies with their correct symbols and formats.

FinalCTA.title: Start tracking your expenses today
FinalCTA.subtitle: Join thousands of people who already manage their finances with Savii.

Footer.brandDescription: Your smart financial assistant. Track your expenses with your voice, share lists, and visualize your finances.

Privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for the Savii application.
Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Intro: Savii collects the minimum information necessary to provide you with the service. This includes:
Privacy.s1Item1: Financial data you record (amounts, categories, expense descriptions).
Privacy.s1Item2: Voice audio temporarily processed to extract expense information via AI. Audio is not stored.
Privacy.s2Intro: Your information is used exclusively for:
Privacy.s2Item1: Recording and organizing your personal expenses.
Privacy.s2Item2: Generating statistics and visualizations of your finances.
Privacy.s2Item3: Syncing shared lists between people you invite.
Privacy.s2Item4: Improving the accuracy of voice recognition.
Privacy.s3Text: Your data is stored securely on your device. If you enable cloud backup, data is encrypted during transfer and storage. We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal information to third parties.
Privacy.s4Text: When you share a list, only the people you invite can see the expenses on that list. Each participant only has access to the shared list, not your other personal data.
Privacy.s5Text: Savii uses Google Gemini AI for voice processing. Audio is sent securely to Google's servers for processing and is not stored after transcription. See the
Privacy.s6Item1: Access all your data stored in the app.
Privacy.s6Item2: Delete your account and all associated data.
Privacy.s6Item3: Export your data at any time.
Privacy.s7Text: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you about significant changes through the app.
Privacy.s8Text: If you have questions about this policy, write to us at

Terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use for the Savii application.
Terms.title: Terms of Use
Terms.s1Text: By downloading, installing, or using Savii, you accept these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you should not use the application.
Terms.s2Text: Savii is a personal finance application that allows you to record expenses by voice or manually, view financial statistics, share expense lists with others, and manage your finances in multiple currencies and languages.
Terms.s3Item1: Use the app only for personal and legal purposes.
Terms.s3Item2: Provide accurate information when recording your expenses.
Terms.s3Item3: Not attempt to access other users' data without authorization.
Terms.s3Item4: Not modify, decompile, or reverse engineer the application.
Terms.s4Text: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and all activities that occur under it. Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized use.
Terms.s5Text: By creating or joining a shared list, you agree that other participants will be able to see the expenses recorded in that list. You are responsible for inviting only people you trust.
Terms.s6Text: Savii and all its content (design, code, logos, text) are the property of its creators and are protected by intellectual property laws. No rights to these elements are granted beyond personal use of the app.
Terms.s7Text: Savii is provided "as is." We do not guarantee that the app will be free of errors or interruptions. We are not responsible for financial decisions made based on information displayed in the app. Savii is a tracking tool, not a financial advisor.
Terms.s8Text: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the service at any time. We will notify you about significant changes through the app.
Terms.s9Text: We may update these terms occasionally. Continued use of Savii after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
Terms.s10Text: If you have questions about these terms, write to us at
